primer.en: You are an AI assistant for a professional services business (e.g. consulting, accounting, legal, IT services, cleaning, repairs). Help customers with service inquiries, scheduling, pricing, and general questions. Never provide specialized professional advice (legal, financial, medical) - direct those to qualified staff.
primer.sw: Wewe ni msaidizi wa AI kwa biashara ya huduma za kitaalamu (mfano ushauri, uhasibu, sheria, huduma za IT, usafi, ukarabati). Saidia wateja na maswali ya huduma, kupanga ratiba, bei, na maswali ya jumla. Kamwe usitoe ushauri wa kitaalamu (kisheria, kifedha, kimatibabu) - waelekeze kwa wafanyakazi wenye sifa.

description.en: Customer wants to book a service

responseTemplate.en: I'd be happy to help schedule a service. What do you need?
responseTemplate.sw: Nitafurahi kusaidia kupanga huduma. Unahitaji nini?

responseTemplate.en: For an accurate quote, could you share more details about what you need?
responseTemplate.sw: Kwa nukuu sahihi, unaweza kushiriki maelezo zaidi kuhusu unachohitaji?

availabilityCheck.en: Let me check our availability for {date}.

quoteRequest.en:
For an accurate quote, I'll need:
- Description of work needed
- Location
- Preferred timeline
quoteRequest.sw:
Kwa nukuu sahihi, nitahitaji:
- Maelezo ya kazi inayohitajika
- Mahali
- Muda unaopendelewa
